title: Please Bring Back "Hightlight New Board Changes"
excerpt: This was so essential. It brought a great efficiency and sense of calm to see at a glance all the items and cells that had changed since your last visit to a board. I realized the other day, I hadn’t seen any green highl…

posts.author: Bennett (Bennett Killmer)
posts.cookedHtml:
This was so essential. It brought a great efficiency and sense of calm to see at a glance all the items and cells that had changed since your last visit to a board. I realized the other day, I hadn’t seen any green highlights in a while.

So sad to see this amazing feature killed

posts.author: Emil (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed. Why take it away?

Bring it back please!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s funny - we hadn’t even missed it and I hadn’t thought of it for a long time until I came across this post. It would be nice to see it come back as a toggle you could turn on or off, like Conditional Coloring.
